dossiers.title: When Sacred Power Meets The Law
dossiers.description: A civic-accountability dossier on the Pallegama Hemarathana case, allegation status, child protection, religious power, police process, media framing, MMDA child-marriage parallels, and Buddhist public ethics.
dossiers.descriptionSi: පල්ලේගම හේමරතන හිමියන්ගේ නඩුව, චෝදනා තත්ත්වය, ළමා ආරක්ෂාව, ආගමික බලය, පොලිස් ක්‍රියාදාමය, මාධ්‍ය රාමුව, MMDA ළමා විවාහ සමාන්තරය, සහ බෞද්ධ පොදු සදාචාරය පිළිබඳ civic-accountability dossier එකක්.
dossiers.seoDescriptionSi: පල්ලේගම හේමරතන නඩුව ගැන allegation-status, child protection, police process, religious power, MMDA parallel, novice ordination, සහ Buddhist public ethics එක් කරන Analyst dossier එකක්.

dossiers.title: Mullivaikkal and 40,000 deaths?
dossiers.description: A source-gated Analyst dossier testing why the claim that 40,000 people died in Mullivaikkal alone is not verified as stated, how the phrase hardens online, and why correction must not become denial.
dossiers.descriptionSi: `40,000 people died in Mullivaikkal alone` කියන claim එක stated විදිහට තහවුරු නොවන්නේ ඇයි, ඒ වාක්‍යය onlineවල harden වෙන්නේ කොහොමද, සහ correction එක ප්‍රතික්ෂේප කිරීමක් නොවිය යුත්තේ ඇයි කියලා source-gated Analyst dossier එකක්.
dossiers.seoDescriptionSi: මුල්ලිවෛක්කාල්වල 40,000ක් මැරුණාද? මෙම Analyst dossier එක `40,000 deaths in Mullivaikkal alone` claim එක, source trail එක, SEO hardening, casualty-number categories, සහ truth without denial ගැන පරීක්ෂා කරයි.

dossiers.title: The Galanguru Files — Coal, Corruption & Cascading Crises
dossiers.titleSi: The Galanguru Files — ගල් අඟුරු, දූෂණය සහ cascading crises
dossiers.description: Interactive intelligence dossier on Sri Lanka's coal procurement scandal, NPP government accountability, and the Iran war's cascading impact on a fragile recovery.
dossiers.descriptionSi: ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ coal procurement scandal, NPP government accountability, සහ Iran war එක fragile recovery එකකට ඇති කරන cascading impact ගැන interactive intelligence dossier එකක්.

dossiers.title: Happy Womaniser Day! — How a State Newspaper Platformed an Alleged Sexual Predator
dossiers.titleSi: Happy Womaniser Day! — රාජ්‍ය පුවත්පතක් alleged sexual predator කෙනෙකු platform කළාද?
dossiers.description: An investigative dossier examining how the Sunday Observer's 'Observer MUSE' International Women's Day 2026 feature — authored by journalist Anuradha Perera — platformed Vangeesa Sumanasekara, a man facing multiple public sexual harassment allegations, as a champion of women's empowerment.
dossiers.descriptionSi: Sunday Observer හි `Observer MUSE` International Women's Day 2026 feature එක, journalist Anuradha Perera විසින් ලියා, public sexual harassment allegations කිහිපයකට මුහුණ දී සිටින Vangeesa Sumanasekara කෙනෙකු women's empowerment champion කෙනෙකු ලෙස platform කළේ කොහොමද කියන investigative dossier එකක්.

dossiers.title: The War That Changed Everything: Iran, Israel & the Unravelling of American Power
dossiers.description: A multi-disciplinary analysis of the February 2026 Iran-US-Israel conflict through geopolitics, game theory, theology, psychology, and history — with dedicated focus on Sri Lanka's strategic position, the tech oligarchy feedback loop, and the 10-15 year window that could change everything.

dossiers.title: The Caravan Fresh Chicken Cheese Bomb: A Consumer Advocacy Case Study
dossiers.titleSi: Caravan Fresh Chicken Cheese Bomb: consumer advocacy case study එකක්
dossiers.description: An investigative analysis of corporate social media marketing practices in Sri Lanka, examining the viral 'Chicken Cheese Bomb' incident — including documented patterns of consumer complaint suppression, brand ambassador deployment, and systematic evidence deletion across 69 retail outlets.
dossiers.descriptionSi: ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ corporate social media marketing practices ගැන investigative analysis එකක්: viral `Chicken Cheese Bomb` incident එක, consumer complaint suppression patterns, brand ambassador deployment, සහ retail outlets 69ක evidence deletion ගැන.

dossiers.title: The Sallay Arrest & the Easter Sunday Conspiracy — Political Research Dossier
dossiers.description: A deep investigation into the arrest of intelligence operative Suresh Sallay, the Easter Sunday bombings conspiracy, and the political machinations connecting Sri Lanka's intelligence apparatus to the worst terrorist attack in the nation's history.

dossiers.title: The Death of Sri Lankan Cricket: Politics, Mafia & The Road to Ruin
dossiers.titleSi: ශ්‍රී ලංකා ක්‍රිකට්ගේ මරණය: දේශපාලනය, mafia සහ විනාශයට යන මාර්ගය
dossiers.description: How political patronage, a "cricket mafia", toxic fan culture, and systemic institutional rot destroyed a once-proud cricketing nation — and why the new government appears powerless to fix it.
dossiers.descriptionSi: Political patronage, `cricket mafia`, toxic fan culture සහ institutional rot එක, එක කාලෙක ආඩම්බර වූ cricket nation එකක් විනාශ කළේ කොහොමද — සහ නව රජය ඒක හදාගන්න අසමත් වගේ පේන්නේ ඇයි.

dossiers.title: The Form Was Empty — Anatta, Bamiyan, and the Doctrine of Non-Self
dossiers.titleSi: The Form Was Empty — Anatta, Bamiyan සහ non-self ධර්මය
dossiers.description: A philosophical exploration connecting the Buddhist doctrine of Anatta (non-self) with the destruction of the Bamiyan Buddhas — examining how the statues' absence paradoxically embodies the teaching they once represented.
dossiers.descriptionSi: Anatta හෙවත් non-self බෞද්ධ ධර්මය Bamiyan Buddhas විනාශය සමඟ සම්බන්ධ කරන philosophical exploration එකක් — පිළිම නොමැතිවීම ඒවා නියෝජනය කළ teaching එක paradoxically පෙන්වන්නේ කොහොමද කියලා බලයි.

dossiers.title: Sri Lanka & the Hormuz Crisis — What You Need to Know
dossiers.titleSi: ශ්‍රී ලංකාව සහ Hormuz crisis — දැනගත යුතු දේ
dossiers.description: A comprehensive analysis of how the Strait of Hormuz crisis impacts Sri Lanka's energy security, economic stability, and geopolitical positioning — with trilingual coverage in English, Sinhala, and Tamil.
dossiers.descriptionSi: Strait of Hormuz crisis එක ශ්‍රී ලංකාවේ energy security, economic stability සහ geopolitical positioning වලට බලපාන්නේ කොහොමද කියන comprehensive analysis එකක් — English, Sinhala, Tamil තුන් භාෂාවෙන්.

internal.title: Architecture Monitor
internal.description: Internal platform health and deployment monitor. Unlisted until admin login and backend mapping are unified.
